narrative: USD mixed as markets await a potential US-Iran deal — crude prices fall on hopes of diplomacy; EUR/USD at 1.1794, GBP/USD near 1.3568, USD/JPY trading at 158.92. Gold lower -0.16% on reduced safe-haven demand amid equity gains +1.18% and VIX at 18.4. DXY steady +0.02% as yield curve regime signals a bull steepener, indicating recession pricing.
